steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts “traditional descriptions of pollination syndromes” with “recent empirical observations of floral‑trait combinations” and says this contrast has led ecologists to question the usefulness of those descriptions.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: “Discrepancies between” directly signals a mismatch, which explains why ecologists have reservations. The other three choices suggest agreement, similarity, or repetition, none of which would cause doubt. That matches choice D — D is correct.
